# school-info negative corpus — should NOT trigger
# Generic school references without names, or unrelated named entities
The school is nearby
There is a school on that street
I attended school in the 1990s
School lunch program is available
School bus route 42
Public school system in the city
University research program
College campus building
The gymnasium is open
After-school activities available
Community center programs
Evening classes available
Training program certification
Professional development course
Business school of thought
Google headquarters campus
Microsoft campus in Redmond
Amazon distribution center
Apple Park corporate office
IBM research laboratory
